subject: [PATCH 04/19] nfsd: fix netlink dumpit error handling for rpc_status_get

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes an error handling issue in the NFS daemon's netlink dump functionality. When composing a message for rpc_status_get, the code would return -ENOBUFS on failure to add attributes without canceling the partial message, causing the netlink dump infrastructure to abort the entire dump. The patch corrects this by canceling the partial message and returning the number of bytes added if some messages were successfully added, allowing for pagination instead of a fatal error.
